segments.text: Jab gets scary at higher percents, but with this spin movement, you avoid getting caught by jab in the first place.
segments.original_text: 弱に当たると怖くなってくるどんなパーセントではあるが まずは弱に当たらないでしょうこのスピンの立ち回り

segments.text: Aerial, strong attack - that's the finisher! Boom!
segments.original_text: 空中攻撃 強攻撃 やはり飛ばし技 バーン!

full_text: Jab gets scary at higher percents, but with this spin movement, you avoid getting caught by jab in the first place. Aerial, strong attack - that's the finisher! Boom!
